InstructionData.Title: Smart Liquid Cooler
InstructionData.Description: Manages hangar doors surrounding liquid radiators. Maximizing atmosphere exposure to keep liquid as cold as possible ​
InstructionData.Author: Unknown
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # Smart Liquid Cooler ####################################################
define OutflowValve -1280984102 define InflowPump 1310794736 define InflowInfo 435685051 define SystemInfo 272136332
alias temp r1 alias tooHot r2 alias inflowOpen r3 alias outflowOpen r4
define targetTemp 293 # ~20c
#=================================================== loop: jal updateInfo jal updateSystem j loop
#--------------------------------------------------- updateInfo:
# check system temperature lb temp SystemInfo Temperature Average #s db Setting temp
# check inflow pressure lb r0 InflowInfo Pressure Average
# determine if the inflow pump should be on sgtz inflowOpen r0
# determine if the system is too hot sgt tooHot temp targetTemp
# determine if the outflow value is open nor outflowOpen inflowOpen tooHot # if (!inflowOpen && !tooHot)
j ra
#--------------------------------------------------- updateSystem:
sb InflowPump On inflowOpen sb OutflowValve On outflowOpen
j ra
